title: HB MH: fit and finalize in one call
summary: Run Hierarchical Bayes MCMC and write all exports in a single command.
oce_text:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "coded_long.csv"
run_dir = "./runs/hb"
run_name = "pilot"
segments = 1
iterations = 10000
burnin = 0.2

title: HB MH: 2-segment fit-finalize with holdout
summary: Fit a 2-segment HB mixture model with holdout evaluation and write all exports in one call.
oce_text:
[["model-mnl-hb-mh::fit-finalize"]]
input = "coded_long.csv"
test_input = "coded_long_test.csv"
run_dir = "./runs/hb"
run_name = "pilot_k2"
segments = 2
iterations = 20000
threads = 4
burnin = 0.2
